name: ProDesk Mechanical Keyboard
short_description: A compact tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with tactile brown switches, RGB backlighting, and a durable aluminum frame.
use_case: Ideal for programmers, writers, and students who type for long hours and want a satisfying tactile feel without loud clicks.

name: LumiSmart Desk Lamp
short_description: A smart LED desk lamp with adjustable color temperature, brightness control, a USB-A charging port, and a built-in timer.
use_case: Perfect for students and remote workers who need adjustable lighting for reading, studying, or video calls at their desk.

name: SoundWave Pro Earbuds
short_description: Truly wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, 28-hour total battery life, and IPX5 water resistance.
use_case: Great for commuters, gym-goers, and anyone who wants to focus without distractions. Works well for calls and music.

name: UltraHub USB-C Hub
short_description: A 7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI, two USB-A ports, SD/microSD card readers, and 100W pass-through charging.
use_case: Essential for MacBook or laptop users who need to connect multiple peripherals at once. Great for presentations and home office setups.

name: RiseUp Laptop Stand
short_description: An adjustable aluminum laptop stand with 6 height settings, foldable design, and non-slip pads to improve posture and airflow.
use_case: Helps students and professionals maintain better posture during long work sessions. Pairs well with an external keyboard and mouse.

name: ClearView HD Webcam
short_description: A 1080p HD webcam with autofocus, built-in stereo microphone, privacy cover, and universal clip mount.
features: Universal clip fits monitors and laptops
use_case: Best for remote workers, students attending online classes, and anyone who wants a clear video presence in Zoom or Teams calls.

name: PowerBank X20000
short_description: A 20,000mAh portable power bank with dual USB-A outputs, one USB-C output, 18W fast charging, and an LED battery indicator.
use_case: Reliable backup power for students on campus, travelers, or anyone away from an outlet. Can charge a phone 4-5 times.

name: NoiseFree Headphones
short_description: Over-ear wireless headphones with premium active noise cancellation, 40-hour battery life, foldable design, and memory foam earcups.
use_case: Top pick for students in busy dorms, open offices, or libraries. Also works as a wired headset when battery runs out.

name: MonitorGlow Light Bar
short_description: A monitor-mounted LED light bar with asymmetric lighting design to illuminate your desk without screen glare, plus wireless remote control.
features: Mounts on most monitors without clips
use_case: Great addition to any desk setup that needs extra lighting without the bulk of a separate lamp. Popular for late-night study and coding sessions.

name: SmartPlug Mini
short_description: A compact Wi-Fi smart plug that lets you control any outlet remotely via app or voice assistant, with energy monitoring built in.
features: Works with Alexa, Google Home, and Apple HomeKit
Compact design does not block second outlet
Away mode for random on/off scheduling
use_case: Turn any regular device smart. Great for controlling lamps, fans, or chargers on a schedule or remotely.

name: ErgoWrist Mouse Pad
short_description: An extended XXL mouse pad with a built-in memory foam wrist rest, water-resistant surface, and non-slip rubber base.
features: XXL size covers keyboard and mouse area
Compatible with optical and laser mice
use_case: Reduces wrist strain during long typing or gaming sessions. Ideal for students who use a desktop or external mouse setup.

name: AirCharge Wireless Pad
short_description: A 15W fast wireless charging pad compatible with Qi-enabled phones, AirPods, and smartwatches, with a sleek matte finish.
features: 15W fast charge for Samsung, 12W for other Android, 7.5W for iPhone
use_case: Clean desk solution for wireless phone charging. Works with most modern smartphones and wireless earbuds cases.
